name: Euclid's Elements Book III — Propositions 1–5
description: Dependency graph for definitions and propositions 1–5 of Book III. Theory of circles: center, chords, diameters. All depend on Book I.
mermaid:
graph TD
    BookI["Book I\nFoundation"]
    PropII5["Prop. II.5\nFrom Book II"]
    Def1["Def. III.1\nEqual circles"]
    Def2["Def. III.2\nTangent"]
    Def3["Def. III.3\nCircles touching"]
    Def4["Def. III.4\nEqually distant from center"]
    Def5["Def. III.5\nGreater distance"]
    Def6["Def. III.6\nSegment of circle"]
    Def7["Def. III.7\nAngle of segment"]
    Def8["Def. III.8\nAngle in segment"]
    Def9["Def. III.9\nAngle stands on circumference"]
    Def10["Def. III.10\nSector"]
    Def11["Def. III.11\nSimilar segments"]
    Prop1["Prop. III.1\nFind center of circle"]
    Prop2["Prop. III.2\nChord falls within circle"]
    Prop3["Prop. III.3\nDiameter bisects chord at right angles"]
    Prop4["Prop. III.4\nNon-diameters do not bisect"]
    Prop5["Prop. III.5\nCutting circles do not share center"]
    BookI --> Def1
    BookI --> Def2
    BookI --> Def3
    BookI --> Def4
    BookI --> Def5
    BookI --> Def6
    BookI --> Def7
    BookI --> Def8
    BookI --> Def9
    BookI --> Def10
    BookI --> Def11
    BookI --> Prop1
    BookI --> Prop2
    Prop1 --> Prop2
    BookI --> Prop3
    Prop1 --> Prop3
    BookI --> Prop4
    Prop3 --> Prop4
    BookI --> Prop5
    classDef foundation fill:#95a5a6,color:#fff,stroke:#7f8c8d
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef proposition fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class BookI,PropII5 foundation
    class Def1,Def2,Def3,Def4,Def5,Def6,Def7,Def8,Def9,Def10,Def11 definition
    class Prop1,Prop2,Prop3,Prop4,Prop5 proposition
